name: Honey Macaroonies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a mixing bowl, combine oats, coconut, walnuts and flour; set aside. In a saucepan, combine brown sugar, margarine, and honey. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally. Pour over oat mixture. Mix well. For each cookie, press one level tablespoon of mixture into a prepared 1 3/4 inch muffin pan. Top each cookie with a candied cherry. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
